**By Sruthijith**

* * *

Delhi has govt run Gau sadans (shelters for cows)that spend more money per cow than MCD (Municipal Corporation of Delhi) schools spend per student. Major riots have been sparked by conflicts over cow slaughter. A proposed ban on cow slaughter hogged national headlines with leaders of all hues debating fervently the strategic matter. Khushwant Singh once saved two young men who were near-lynched by an angry mob that accused them of cow slaughter. And now [this](http://web.archive.org/web/20041205015805/http://www.wired.com/news/culture/0,1284,65717,00.html?tw=wn_story_top5).
